sections.paragraph:
ἀποπληρόω (s. πληρόω; since Hippocr., Pla.; also Joseph., Tat.) fulfill Gal 6:2 v.l. (for ἀναπλη.).

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 119
